case_title: DEVA YOUNGBLOOD VS. BYRON MOLINA ET AL.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-13-2019 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUN-03-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YOUNGBLOOD, DEVA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOLINA, BYRON D.B.A.   BRIZUELA'S AUTO BODY BRIZUELA, PABLO DBA  BRIZUELA'S AUTO BODY $1,300.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,300.00, DEFENDANTS BYRON MOLINA AND PABLO BRIZUELA JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF DEVA YOUNGBLOOD $1300. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

ORDER GRANTING REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY DEFENDANT MOLINA, BYRON D.B.A.   BRIZUELA'S AUTO BODY BRIZUELA, PABLO DBA  BRIZUELA'S AUTO BODY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-03-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-03-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF DEVA YOUNGBLOOD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BYRON MOLINA DBA BRIZUELA'S AUTO BODY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PABLO BRIZUELA DBA BRIZUELA'S AUTO BODY IS PRESENT IS ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER JEAN GARASCIA. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT PABLO BRIZUELA DBA BRIZUELA AUTO BODY. DEFENDANT PABLO BRIZUELA WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
